meta.title: STEM x TEB Technikum
meta.description: STEM Technology Club at TEB Technikum in Warsaw. Robotics, mechatronics, programming — we create the future.

about.title: Who we are
about.description: Technikum students fascinated and absorbed in the world of technology. We are diverse, but united by our passion for creation and innovation — in both hardware and software.
about.roboticsDesc: We design and build robots that solve real-world problems.
about.mechatronicsDesc: We combine mechanics, electronics, and computer science into innovative systems.
about.programmingDesc: We create apps, websites, and systems that improve everyday life.
